Admin Portal
Mobile BLE · Go Backend · Supabase

Attendance verified by phones already in the room

Faculty and HODs start sessions in Presenze Dashboard. Their phone becomes the secure BLE advertiser, student phones scan when marking attendance, and every verified record appears in the Admin Portal in real time.

Admin Portal
Real-Time Sync Active
Platform Capabilities

Everything attendance needs, from BLE verification to ERP control

Presenze keeps the product surface simple: one student app, one shared Dashboard app for Faculty and HOD roles, and one Admin Portal for the institution.

Bluetooth Low Energy Attendance

Faculty phone advertises a secure live session while student phones scan and verify presence over BLE within seconds. Verified records instantly sync through the Go backend to Supabase and appear live in the Admin Portal.

Learn more

Role-Based Authentication & Security

Faculty and HODs use the same Presenze Dashboard app with screens and permissions tailored to their role. Secure cloud backend validates sessions and writes clean, auditable attendance records with full traceability.

Learn more

Student Mobile App

Students get Mark Attendance, history, timetable, notifications, and profile access in one streamlined app. Receive timely attendance, timetable, and administrative updates directly through push notifications.

Learn more

Faculty & HOD Dashboard

Start sessions, monitor live detection, review classes, and access role-scoped academic views on mobile. Connect to official timetables so faculty start the right class with minimal manual setup.

Learn more

Admin ERP Portal

Web portal for managing students, faculty, HODs, departments, classrooms, users, reports, and analytics. Bulk import institutional data via Excel without rebuilding records manually.

Learn more

Attendance Analytics & Reports

Track attendance by student, subject, section, department, or timeframe without manual spreadsheet work. Generate comprehensive reports and insights for data-driven decision making.

Learn more

Department & Academic Management

Organize departments, HOD access, classroom allocation, and academic reporting from one unified layer. Model courses, semesters, sections, subjects, and allocations so attendance lands in the correct record.

Learn more

Offline Resilience

Temporary network drops don't break sessions; queued records reconcile automatically when connectivity returns. The system ensures no attendance data is lost even during connectivity issues.

Learn more

Scalable Campus Infrastructure

The mobile BLE pattern scales from one department to full campus without requiring classroom hardware. Designed to grow with your institution's needs while maintaining performance and reliability.

Learn more

Want to see how it all works together?

The Mobile BLE Sequence

A professor-led signal, student scanners, and instant ERP records

Follow the complete journey from BLE broadcast to real-time Admin Portal visibility

Live Attendance Path

From BLE Signal to Admin Portal

Dashboard App
Faculty/HOD
1
BLE Advertiser
Professor phone
2
Student App
Mark attendance
3
BLE Scanner
Student phone
4
Verification
Token validation
5
Go Backend
Processing
6
Supabase
Records
7
Admin Portal
Live view
8
Live Sync Active
Real-time updates
01

Faculty/HOD opens Presenze Dashboard

Shared mobile app authenticates the user and loads role-appropriate screens. Session links to class, subject, timetable, and room automatically.

02

Phone requests Bluetooth & becomes advertiser

App requests the Bluetooth access needed to run the live BLE flow. Professor's phone then broadcasts a secure session signal nearby.

03

Students open Presenze app

Students use the dedicated Presenze student app for attendance and tap Mark Attendance to start scanning only for the active, valid classroom session.

04

Student phones scan for advertiser

Scanner phones detect the Dashboard advertiser over Bluetooth Low Energy and identify the active session signal.

05

Attendance verified

System validates session token, student identity, and BLE proximity to ensure authentic presence verification.

06

Uploaded to Go backend

Verified events sent to backend for validation and persistence with complete audit trail.

07

Stored in Supabase

Clean records written to database with real-time Admin Portal sync for instant visibility.

08

Live Admin Portal updates

Records appear instantly in the web-based Admin Portal where administrators can view, manage, and analyze attendance data in real-time.

No Classroom Hardware Required

Unlike traditional systems that require fixed RFID readers or biometric devices in every classroom, Presenze uses the phones already in everyone's pockets. Faculty phones act as BLE advertisers, student phones scan, and the entire flow happens through mobile apps.

Secure BLE validation
Real-time sync
Supabase records

Mobile Apps Coming Soon

Presenze and Presenze Dashboard are currently in development. The Admin Portal is live and ready for institutional setup. Mobile releases will follow with full BLE attendance capabilities.

Follow on GitHubConnect on LinkedIn
Built with Intent

A classroom problem, solved as campus infrastructure

Samarth Ravi Y

Founder

What started as a frustration with paper attendance in my own classes became Presenze. A mobile-first BLE solution that removes friction from the daily routine. I built this to prove that campus infrastructure can feel modern and effortless, not just digitized. Now, we're expanding beyond attendance to create tools that institutions actually want to use.

Samarth
“

Great software is not just faster.
It makes the correct process feel natural.

”
Questions

The details Institutions ask before rollout

Common questions about how Presenze works, what it requires, and how it scales.

Faculty or HOD opens Presenze Dashboard and starts a session. Their phone requests Bluetooth permission and becomes the BLE advertiser. Students open Presenze, tap Mark Attendance, and their phones scan for the live session. Verified attendance uploads to the Go backend, stores in Supabase, and appears in the Admin Portal instantly.
